stemHtml:
Which statement is correct regarding the gyroscopic effect of a anti-clockwise rotating propeller on a single engine aeroplane?

I. Pitch down produces right yaw.
II. Left yaw produces pitch up.

options.a: I is correct, II is incorrect.
options.b: I is correct, II is correct.
options.c: I is incorrect, II is correct.
options.d: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
